contestDescription: A 48-hour hackathon focused on building innovative dApps and tools for the Cardano ecosystem. Participants will compete for prizes while showcasing their development skills and creativity.
submissionRequirements: Projects must be built during the hackathon period, use Cardano blockchain technology, and include a working demo. Source code must be open source and submitted to GitHub.
contestRules: All participants must register before the start date. Teams can have up to 4 members. Projects must be original work created during the hackathon. No use of pre-existing codebases beyond standard libraries.
eligibilityRequirements: Open to developers worldwide. Participants must be 18+ years old. Previous hackathon experience is welcome but not required.
